title: MeridianImplementationAssuranceRubric
description: Structured rubric output for the meridian-implementation-assurance skill. Pass to codex exec via --output-schema to obtain a scoreable, machine-readable verdict.

overall_pass.description: True when total >= 8/10 and no category scored 0.

score.description: Sum of all category scores (5 categories × 0-2 each = 0-10).

scenario.description: Evaluated scenario ID: A=code+existing-docs, B=code+missing-docs, C=perf-sensitive.

notes.description: Concise evidence or failure reason for this category.

failed_checks.description: Human-readable list of checks that scored 0. Empty when all pass.

corrective_follow_ups.description: Actionable follow-up items for any failed or partial checks.
